---
title: "Op-eds"
description: "Opinion pieces I have authored or co-authored in newspapers and magazines"
listing:
  - id: op-eds-list
    contents:
      - "*.qmd"
      - op-eds.yml
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      description: "Publication"
      title: "Article"
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

Opinion pieces published in newspapers, magazines, and online outlets. Titles link to the original publication.

::: {#op-eds-list}
:::
